author: commentry/crew/fiddler
text:
Review checkpoint (full-wave historical delta, template-based)
Scope: full wave | Convoy: hq-cv-73uea | Range: 5fb03e01ea4086610f6345f7032b3f854181d571..3d1ab913cb79dda4ccc8e6d4f18ebbaf615aa91d
Evidence:
- Verification: LAZY_OFFLINE=1 ./scripts/test -> pass (18 cases, 0 fails)
Findings triage:
- Critical: none
- Important:
  1) Direct :DiffviewOpen auto-attach path does not load persisted comments (lua/commentry/diffview.lua, lua/commentry/commands.lua)
  2) Reconcile logic handles out-of-range only; moved lines not remapped (lua/commentry/comments.lua)
  3) Root detection/persistence skip can be silent (lua/commentry/comments.lua)
  4) Missing integration tests for action/attach lifecycle (tests/commentry_comments_spec.lua)
- Minor:
  1) :Commentry nargs='?' inconsistent with trailing args parsing (lua/commentry/config.lua, lua/commentry/commands.lua)
Assessment:
- Ready for closure: No (important behavior gaps must be fixed first)
Actions:
- Keep convoy open; do not claim wave closure until important findings are resolved and re-reviewed.

author: commentry/crew/fiddler
text:
Processed findings from reviewer agent 019c7fce-cfb1-7951-83ae-4765e3f0254e (receiving-review triage)
Triage outcomes:
1) Store.write success on writefile non-zero return (reported Critical)
- Decision: ACCEPT
- Evidence: lua/commentry/store.lua uses `local wrote = pcall(vim.fn.writefile, ...)` and treats pcall success as write success; non-zero return code is currently ignored.
- Action: tracked in com-7ld.4 (WP-R40).

2) Persisted comments not loaded on direct Diffview auto-attach path (Important)
- Decision: ACCEPT
- Evidence: comments.load_current_view() only called in Diffview.open() scheduled branch; auto-attach autocmd path marks buffers only.
- Action: tracked in com-7ld.4 (WP-R40).

3) Reconcile only removes out-of-range comments, does not remap moved lines (Important)
- Decision: ACCEPT WITH ADAPTATION
- Evidence: reconcile_for_context() only checks line_number > line_count.
- Adaptation: implement safe remap or explicit unresolved/orphan handling to prevent silent mis-anchors.
- Action: tracked in com-7ld.4 (WP-R40).

4) Missing integration lifecycle tests (Minor)
- Decision: ACCEPT
- Evidence: current suite focuses helpers/store paths and limited persistence render cases; lacks end-to-end action/attach lifecycle coverage.
- Action: tracked in com-7ld.4 (WP-R40) and final verification task com-7ld.3.

5) FR coverage commentary from reviewer
- Decision: PARTIAL ACCEPT (informational)
- Evidence: coverage observations are useful but not all are strict defects; no direct action item beyond above fixes.

Result:
- Added task com-7ld.4 and made com-7ld.3 depend on it.
- Added com-7ld.4 to convoy hq-cv-73uea.

author: commentry/crew/fiddler
text:
Initial execution note for WP-R40 review remediation
Accepted findings to implement:
- Handle writefile non-zero return as persistence failure.
- Load persisted comments on direct Diffview auto-attach path.
- Improve reconcile behavior for moved/changed lines (safe remap or unresolved handling).
- Add lifecycle/integration coverage for action + attach/load paths.
Verification target:
- LAZY_OFFLINE=1 ./scripts/test -> pass with added coverage.

author: commentry/crew/fiddler
text:
Code review packet (integration branch):
- Scope: full wave integration readiness
- Convoy: hq-cv-og7li
- Git range: 7ee2f5684cbfede0bb8e5af8d508628d3cba2812..b8e2d682291446c5cf3657752c7dbd087a46b157
- Verification: LAZY_OFFLINE=1 ./scripts/test -> pass (57 cases, 0 fails)

Reviewer findings:
- Critical: v1->v2 migration/data compatibility gap (store/context path + required v2 fields)
- Important: custom comment_types rejected by store validation
- Important: overlapping ranges can target wrong/unreachable thread for edit/delete/type
- Important: per-file review state behavior appears incomplete vs stated scope
- Minor: mixed context-id resolution strictness in some commands

Triage/actions:
- Treat non-backward-compat concern against epic non-goal ("Backward compatibility with existing local store schema") as spec check needed, not auto-block.
- Remaining Important issues require code/requirement reconciliation before closure claim.
- Run follow-up targeted review after remediation or documented scope deferrals.
